articles.title: Sign-ups for the Los Angeles Regional are open again!
articles.snippet: All you need to know about the 2026 Los Angeles Regional Championships, one of the major VGC events in North America, held on 9–10 May 2026!

articles.title: A new wave of the Empoleon the Unrivaled 7★ Tera Raid Battle event is live!
articles.snippet: This Tera Raid Battle event lasts until 2 April. Empoleon the Unrivaled was last featured in February 2024, so take this chance to catch it if you didn't back then!

articles.title: Sign-ups for the Lima SC are open!
articles.snippet: All you need to know about the 2026 Lima Special Championships, one of the major VGC events in Latin America, held on 23–24 May 2026!

articles.title: Pokemon Presents February 2026
articles.snippet: Tune in for exciting Pokemon news and announcements.

articles.title: Pokemon TCG: Paldean Fates Now Available
articles.snippet: The latest Pokemon TCG expansion featuring Shiny Pokemon is now available at retailers.

articles.title: Pokemon Scarlet and Violet DLC: The Indigo Disk
articles.snippet: Explore the Terarium and encounter legendary Pokemon.

articles.title: Pokemon TCG: Prismatic Evolutions Announced
articles.snippet: A special expansion featuring Terastal Pokemon coming January 2025.

articles.title: Pokemon Legends: Z-A Coming 2026
articles.snippet: The next Pokemon RPG set in the Kalos region announced.
